name: Salmon Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, powdered sugar, Dijon mustard, salt, and cayenne pepper in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add eggs and whisk until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly to avoid curdling.
4. Stir in vinegar slowly; mix well.
5. Cook over hot water until thickened, stirring continuously.
6. Add butter and stir until incorporated.
7. Soften gelatin in cold water; combine with the hot mixture.
8. Stir until gelatin is fully dissolved.
9. Gradually add flaked salmon to the mixture. Chill, stirring occasionally.
10. When slightly thickened, gently fold in whipped cream.
11. Turn into a 2-quart fish-shaped mold that has been rinsed with cold water.
12. Unmold onto lettuce leaves.
13. Decorate with slices of pimento, olive, and thin slices of radish arranged for eyes and scales.
